description: Composition Printed purple kurta made of a blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, pin tucked yoke mock placket, three-quarter sleeves with pin tucked cuffs, mildly pleated along the empire waist and has rounded side slits Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear art wherever you go! The simple silhouette and pin tucked cuffs make this kurta from aneri a fab buy. Crafted from soft fabric in stylish cuts, this kurta offers exemplary comfort and is sure to elevate into a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings or jeans and sleek long earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
